# SVG to Icon Font Generator

> A free, browser-based tool that converts SVG icons into a web icon font (TTF, WOFF, WOFF2)
> with a CSS file and an HTML demo cheatsheet. All processing happens locally in the browser —
> no files are uploaded to any server. It is a privacy-friendly alternative to IcoMoon.

## What it does
- Converts one or many SVG icons into a downloadable icon font: TTF, WOFF and WOFF2.
- Generates a CSS file (@font-face plus .icon-* classes) and a demo.html cheatsheet.
- Imports an existing icon font (TTF/OTF/WOFF/WOFF2) so you can update it while keeping the
  original Unicode codepoints, so existing CSS keeps working.
- Centers, trims and pads icons automatically to fix off-center or corner artwork.
- Auto-saves your work in the browser (localStorage) so a reload does not lose icons.

## Key facts
- Price: free.
- Privacy: runs entirely client-side; files never leave the user's device; works offline.
- Output formats: TTF, WOFF, WOFF2, CSS, HTML demo.
- No account or sign-up required.

## How to use
1. Drag and drop SVG files (or click to browse), or import an existing font.
2. Rename icons, set the font name and CSS class prefix, and adjust centering/padding.
3. Click "Generate font".
4. Download the files individually or as a single .zip and add the CSS + fonts to your project.

## Common questions
- Is it free? Yes.
- Are files uploaded? No, everything is processed in the browser.
- Can I update an old icon font? Yes, import it and its codepoints are preserved.
- What formats? TTF, WOFF, WOFF2, plus CSS and a demo page.
